She is like the queen bee of the school and is idolised by the entire student body - except for Medaka who is totally indifferent towards her. This annoys her and she decides to make Medaka fall for her through her charms.

name: Seiichi Samura
description: One of the five surviving enchanted blade wielders from the Seitei War. He's a master of the Iai White Purity Style and the wielder of the enchanted blade Tobimune.

name: Yoshiyuki Taira
description: The first recruited member of BECK, Taira is the bassist, and the most talented band member next to Ryûsuke. He plays Music Man StingRay bass. His attitude may sometimes come off as uncaring. He has been seen working as a traffic officer. As the story progresses, we learn that his father was a jazz musician that left him and his mother when he was young.

name: Akane Sakuramori
description: Saito's classmate and natural enemy. When she's not talking, she's a model-class beauty, but when she sees Saito, she's always fighting with him. She has a strong competitive spirit, is hardworking, and has a family-oriented side. She has a dream that she wants to fulfill even if she has to marry Saito.
